title: Silent Echo: Residual
description: A recreation of the mod Silent Echo from the ground up
body:
FIND THE TRUTH

![A logo for the mod, says the title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/00153abc3a1e3af0214f6f1dc839ba3bed663669.png)

Silent Echo: Residual is a recreation of the original Silent Echo, which is a parody mod that simply parodies badly made horror mods, take cave dweller reskins as an example. 

You play are to investigate the case of Kendrick Mercer and finish his story.

This mod adds new gear, mobs, unique weapons and lore!

Gear includes:



## (NORMAL PATH)

- Organic Metal Gear
  
- Bony Gear
  
- Crystalized Gear

- and Cool Armor



## (PREDATOR PATH)-



- Starved Gear-
 
 - Stalkerskin Gear
  
- Hybrid Gear
  
- and Voidic Gear 

## Alongside some named weapons such as:


- Watcher

- Polterghast

- Reaper Claw

- Fragmented Bell

and the Destroyed Blad
 
 ## Adds 2 bosses fought **after** the Wither and the Ender Dragon

The Pile / The Emergent
and True CreepySteve69 / Kendrick Mercer

**JEI is highly reccomended when playing this as without it you CANNOT beat the mod!****
